name: HYDRA
description: The x402 ecosystem hub and autonomous intelligence engine. 48+ paid endpoints: composite intelligence (alpha signals, risk scores, regulatory pulse), push alerts, x402 ecosystem directory/routing, web extraction, search, conversion, developer tools, web checks, public data, regulatory intelligence, prediction markets, Fed signals, oracle data. From $0.001 USDC on Base L2.

endpoints.description: Active regulatory prediction markets across Polymarket and Kalshi
Micro regulatory event feed matched to prediction markets
Classified regulatory events from SEC, CFTC, Fed, FinCEN
Scored regulatory signal for one prediction market
Bulk scored signals for all regulatory prediction markets
Premium alpha report with edge analysis, Kelly sizing, trade verdict
Pre-FOMC signal with rate probabilities and Fed speech analysis
Real-time FOMC decision classification within 30 seconds of release
FOMC resolution verdict for UMA/Kalshi/Polymarket oracle submission
UMA Optimistic Oracle assertion data with evidence chain
Chainlink External Adapter response format
Professional resolution verdict for prediction market settlement
Full regulatory risk scan against all applicable frameworks
Recent regulatory changes classified by agency and impact
Jurisdiction comparison with compliance cost modeling
Regulatory Q&A with statutory citations
Web scrape — URL to clean structured text
Token price lookup with 24h change and market cap
RSS/Atom feed to structured JSON
Wallet ETH and USDC balance on Base L2
Base L2 gas prices with estimated costs for transfers, swaps, mints
Transaction receipt lookup — status, gas used, block number
Batch up to 5 utility calls in one request — saves gas vs individual payments
Structured web extraction — title, headings, clean text, links, OpenGraph metadata
Batch extraction from up to 5 URLs in parallel
Web search with structured result extraction — titles, snippets, URLs
URL health check — status code, response time, redirect chain, content type
DNS record lookup — A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME via DNS-over-HTTPS
SSL certificate inspection — issuer, expiry, SANs, days remaining
HTTP response headers with security headers analysis and score
HTML to Markdown — preserves headings, lists, links, code blocks, tables
JSON array to CSV with auto-detected headers
CSV text to JSON array of objects
Hash text with SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, SHA-1, or SHA3-256
Encode/decode text — Base64, URL encoding, hex
Unified diff between two texts with change stats and similarity ratio
JSON syntax validation with pretty-print and structure info
Email format validation with MX record check
Wikipedia article summary — extract, thumbnail, description, page URL
arXiv academic paper search — titles, authors, abstracts, PDF links
SEC EDGAR filing search — 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K by company, ticker, or keyword
Canonical x402 ecosystem directory — all known x402 services indexed hourly
x402 ecosystem aggregate statistics — services by chain, category, growth
Real-time health and capability check of any x402 service
Intelligent x402 service routing — find the best service for your need
Hourly regulatory pulse — aggregated agency activity with composite risk signal
Composite alpha signal — regulatory + Fed + prediction markets + momentum
Real-time 0-100 regulatory risk score for any token or protocol
Daily regulatory + market digest for compliance teams and trading agents
Push alert subscription — webhook delivery of regulatory events. $0.10/100 alerts
Real-time regulatory alert feed — last 24 hours of detected events
Check alert subscription status and remaining alerts
Portfolio-level regulatory scan — up to 20 assets with aggregate risk
Portfolio watchlist — agency mentions and alert levels for up to 20 assets
Executive market brief — regulatory + Fed + prediction markets in one view
Multi-step orchestration — execute up to 10 HYDRA calls in one request
